title: Iron's Spells More Quick Cast
description: I ran out of quick cast slot, so I added more.
body:
A small client-side Iron's Spells 'n Spellbooks add-on that allow you to have up to 99 quick cast slots. (exact number is configurable)

![Screenshot of the config screen](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a5eb27c1cb39a7e3291004a55705969a6f3811c9.png)
![Screenshot of the keybinding screen](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c8ceed28151d3c195a10912340ed546656fe3612.png)
